playbook.intent: Foggy sense of last week's KPIs → 30-minute scan + one experiment chosen for next week.
playbook.scope: 30-minute KPI scan: MRR / churn / activation / signup funnel reviewed, anomalies flagged, one experiment chosen for next week, one growth lever pushed. Exit artifact is weekly pulse note + next-week experiment ticket.

success-criteria.criterion: MRR + churn + activation + signups noted weekly
1 experiment chosen for next week with owner + metric

stage.name: Pull
stage.intent: Pull the numbers; don't interpret yet.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when all 4 numbers are on paper. Don't theorise before they're listed.

stage.name: Flag
stage.intent: Anomaly hunt: what's off vs expected.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when each anomaly has a hypothesis. Refuse to leave unflagged.

stage.name: Choose
stage.intent: Pick ONE experiment for next week. Define metric.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: 1 experiment ticket. Refuse multi-experiment weeks (single-operator constraint).

extra.value: [Quarterly pricing decisions — separate quarterly playbook, Deep cohort analysis — monthly cadence]
[Analytics live (Plausible / GA + Stripe events), Dashboard configured (ops-dashboard-setup complete)]
[Looking at MRR daily and panicking — weekly cadence is the rule, Choosing 3 experiments because all looked interesting — kills focus]
['Is the chosen experiment actually shippable in one week solo?', 'Did I write hypotheses for anomalies, or just stare at red numbers?']
{human: faion get-content friday-metrics-mrr-pulse --format md, agent: faion get-content friday-metrics-mrr-pulse --format context, json: faion get-content friday-metrics-mrr-pulse --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
